card_text:
Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite Preview is a comparative catalog entry for Google.

Weekly tokens: 303B.
Context Window: 1,048,576 tokens.
Released: 2026-03-02.
Pricing: $0.25 per 1M input tokens and $1.5 per 1M output tokens.
Capabilities: text, multimodal, vision, reasoning, coding, long context.
